_comment: Focused diagnostic mission: ONLY arm, then hover-hold, so you can confirm the arm recipe alone
arms the drone. Run: autopilot.py --mission mission_arm_test.json --log ; press 'm' to hand over;
watch for props/arming during the 'arm' step, and compare the autopilot [CMD] log (src=recipe:arm
fields={btnARMdown:true}) against the io_bridge [AUTO] console line (btnARM=True).
